customizations.summary: Reduced trigger sensitivity to complex requirements only
customizations.reason: Original trigger was too aggressive, activating brainstorming on simple requests. Changed to only trigger on complex, multi-faceted requirements

customizations.summary: Removed Cursor platform detection from session-start hook
customizations.reason: Only using Claude Code, simplified hook command path. Upstream v5.1.0 changed this file to invoke hooks/run-hook.cmd (Windows-style runner); we explicitly kept the direct bash invocation since custom-09 excludes run-hook.cmd
